trivia: Cessna's first flat-floor stand-up cabin brought midsize comfort at a light-jet price, and charter giant NetJets bought them by the hundred. That makes it unusually catchable for a business jet.
Fractional fleets fly constantly, so the Latitude may quietly become one of your most-seen business types.
funFacts: NetJets operates a huge fleet of them.
The first Citation with a completely flat cabin floor.
